items.title: Official: Light to Moderate Rain is very likely to occur at isolated places over Beed, Dharashiv, Hingoli, Jalna, Latur, Nanded, Palghar, Parbhani, Pune, Raigad, Sangli, Satara, Solapur, Thane in next 3 hours.
items.summary: Light to Moderate Rain is very likely to occur at isolated places over Beed, Dharashiv, Hingoli, Jalna, Latur, Nanded, Palghar, Parbhani, Pune, Raigad, Sangli, Satara, Solapur, Thane in next 3 hours.
items.impact: This event may affect local awareness or movement.
items.recommendedAction: Monitor updates and verify through official sources where needed.
items.affectedArea: Beed, Dharashiv, Hingoli, Jalna, Latur, Nanded, Palghar, Parbhani, Pune, Raigad, Sangli, Satara, Solapur, Thane districts of Maharashtra
